theme: The Patch Kit — S68 Carryover Fixes

shots.title: Fix review amend crash — hole_stats → stats normalization

hazards.description: [architect review] Missing stats field not normalized — fixed with unconditional normalizeStats fallback.

shots.notes: Added normalizeScorecard() to loader.ts, reusing existing normalizeStats() from builder.ts. Applied in loadScorecards() and amendCommand().

shots.title: Implement workflow-step-gate guard

hazards.description: [architect review] SQLite store opened/closed on every Edit/Write — heavier than existing file-based guard patterns. Comment added; consider sidecar file in future.
[architect review] workflow-step-gate missing from GUARD_RELEVANCE map — added.

shots.notes: New guard opens store, finds running execution, loads workflow definition to resolve step type. Blocks Edit/Write if current step is not agent_work.

shots.title: Add concurrent recordStepResult regression test (S67)

hazards.description: [architect review] Promise.all with synchronous better-sqlite3 tests sequential integrity, not true process-level concurrency. Test renamed to clarify.

shots.notes: Promise.all with 3 concurrent calls, asserts no lost writes or duplicates. SQLite serializes internally but test prevents regression if transaction wrapper removed.

shots.title: Broaden review-tier guard path matching
shots.notes: review-tier guard now also matches docs/backlog/*-plan.md, closing the enforcement gap where plans written outside .claude/plans/ bypassed review gating.

yardage_book_updates: normalizeScorecard() exists in loader.ts — use it instead of raw JSON.parse for scorecards
Guards can open SqliteSlopeStore directly for read-only queries
review-tier guard now fires on docs/backlog/*-plan.md too
course_management_notes: All 4 tickets independent — no ordering constraints
Reused existing normalizeStats() rather than reimplementing shape coercion
S68 scorecard itself had the hole_stats bug — good proof the fix was needed
